metadata.title:
THESE W0MANS CLUBS DENY


that RACE SUICIDE CHARGE

THEY SHOW AN AVERAGE OF
THREE AND ONE-HALF CHILL
DREN TO EACH MEMBER.

pages.raw_text:
PITTSBURG, Dec. 29.-Indignant
Pittsburg club women have made
a canvass of the married members
in order to disprove the allegation
that "the club woman commits race
suicide and encourages other wo-
men to do So" The result is a
vindication, they claim. 1t shows
an average of 35 children for each
married woman in the General Fed
Grafton of Women's clubs.


Twenty-one members, selected at
random, had 62 children, an aver
age of about three children to each
member. While number of the
mothers have but one child, enough
have three, four, five or six to
bring up the average. Then, too,
it is pointed out that many of these
mothers are young, and may have
more children in the future.


Many of the clubs carry the
names of the babies of their mem.
bers on their membership lists, not.
ably the Women's Southern club
Three little toddlers attend the
meetings regularly. Wimodasausis
has a pretty custom of presenting
each of it's "club babies" with a
boquet of roses, tied in the clubs
colors. During the month of DC
tober three children were born tc
members of that club, and the
mothers were presented with flow
ers.


Club women make the best ant
most successful mothers" sale
Mrs. Minnie Ourey Roberts, who
ia the mother of seven. "A club
woman is a mother woman, and Is
better fitted by her edcuation tC
Systematically raise family in 6
satisfactory way"


"Three-fourths of the club WON
en- | know have good sized fami
lies" said Mrs. Ludwig Koether
Jr., president of the Women's Civic
club and the mother of four, "and
taey do not neglect their families
